query:
SELECT m.id, m.alunoId, m.competenciaId, m.titulo, m.descricao, m.isActive, 
       ma.status as ultimo_status, ma.mes, ma.ano, ma.observacao
FROM metas m
JOIN alunos a ON a.id = m.alunoId
LEFT JOIN meta_acompanhamento ma ON ma.metaId = m.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Joseane%' OR a.email LIKE '%joseane%'
ORDER BY m.id;
